title: GitHub - plasma-ai/fractal: Hierarchical agent loops with recursive self-organization.
excerpt: Hierarchical agent loops with recursive self-organization. - plasma-ai/fractal
content_html:
Hierarchical agent loops with recursive self-organization.

In a fractal, autonomous agent loops arrange themselves into a tree: a node iterates toward a goal in its own git worktree and spawns child nodes for separable subtasks, so the tree grows to fit the problem rather than a fixed plan. Hard caps (iterations, depth, children, cost, time) keep each loop bounded, and an operator can steer or stop it at any point. Run metadata (including cost) lands in one local SQLite database, which can be interacted with live in a terminal UI.

Source: https://github.com/plasma-ai/fractal

Package: https://pypi.org/project/plasma-fractal/

Documentation: https://docs.plasma.ai/fractal

Installation

Install the fractal package from PyPI:

pip install plasma-fractal

or

pip install fractal

Use pipx install or uv tool install to install the package in an isolated environment. If you use one of these two methods, you must also install plasma-wiki (a plain pip install pulls plasma-wiki and puts wiki on your PATH, but this is not the case when using pipx install or uv tool install).

uv tool install plasma-fractal --with-executables-from plasma-wiki does the same in one command.

Open the dashboard from your project root with fractal open (requires an initialized fractal). Pass --light if your terminal uses a light color scheme.

Skill

Install the skill for your agent via the plugin marketplace (Claude Code and Codex):

# Claude Code
/plugin marketplace add plasma-ai/plugins
/plugin install fractal@plasma

# Codex
codex plugin marketplace add plasma-ai/plugins
codex plugin add fractal@plasma

Another install route is from the CLI, which copies (or symlinks) the fractal and wiki skills into ~/.claude/skills and ~/.agents/skills (add --project for the current project only):

fractal install [--link]

After upgrading the package, re-run fractal install to refresh the copied skills (pass --link for symlinked install).

Usage

A fractal is a tree of git worktrees, each running an autonomous agent loop. The root node branches from your working tree, and child nodes branch from their parent. Agents iterate in tmux sessions, and all state (runs, iters, steps, costs, signals) is tracked in a local SQLite database.

Five agent backends are supported — Claude Code (claude), Codex (codex), Grok Build (grok), OpenCode (opencode), and Oh My Pi (omp) — selected per node with --agent (children inherit it). Claude and Codex can additionally route through OpenRouter with --provider=openrouter, which authenticates via OPENROUTER_API_KEY from the launching shell; OpenCode and Oh My Pi reach OpenRouter natively through their own openrouter/<author>/<model> model ids.

Use the /fractal skill to spawn and manage agent nodes. The fractal CLI is also available directly — run fractal --help and fractal <command> --help to explore.

The skill is invoked as /fractal [directive] and takes plain-language instructions. The agent interprets the directive and prints any suggested NODE.md instructions and completion requirement it can distill from the directive, plus a table of every parameter (empty where the directive said nothing), then asks for anything it could not infer. From there it walks you through refining the node's definition and, once you approve, launches the node in a tmux session.

Parameters the skill interprets from the directive:

  • name: node name (required; letters, digits, and _ only — no -)
  • path: project root, repo root or monorepo sub-project (default: .)
  • title: human-readable display name (default: de-slugged node name)
  • scope: restrict commits to subdirectories within the worktree (comma-separated, e.g. parent/child,tests)
  • base: branch to start from (default: current branch)
  • meta: target node branch for meta-configuration
  • inherit: seed surfaces from the parent node instead of the package seed (comma-separated: steps, scripts, skills, config, or all); agent config always inherits. A top-level spawn's parent is the user node, which carries no steps, scripts, or skills — the parameter is for configured nodes spawning children
  • agent: agent command; inherits the user node's default when omitted
  • provider: provider route for the agent (e.g. openrouter); inherits the user node's default when omitted
  • model: model override; when omitted, the agent uses its own default model
  • effort: reasoning-effort override; when omitted, each agent seed's own pinned level applies, not the vendor default
  • max-iters: per-run iteration cap
  • max-depth: maximum child node nesting depth
  • max-children: maximum direct child nodes
  • max-descendants: maximum total descendant nodes
  • timeout: per-run time limit (e.g. 30m, 1.5h)
  • iter-timeout: per-iteration time limit (e.g. 30m, 1.5h)
  • step-timeout: per-step time limit (e.g. 30s, 10m); caps each step
  • interval: fixed iteration schedule (e.g. 1h)
  • sleep: delay between iterations (e.g. 10s)
  • wait: sleep between approval-wait sync invocations (default: 1m)
  • max-cost: cost ceiling in USD per run — runs are isolated, so each launch arms the cap anew; after a budget-ended run, node start --continue refuses without an explicit --max-cost
  • max-iter-cost: per-iteration cost ceiling in USD
  • max-step-cost: per-step cost ceiling in USD (warn-only when unenforceable)
  • reserve-budget: budget reserved for cleanup; USD or N% of max-cost (default: 10%)
  • sync: enable (default) or disable radio sync before each step
  • detached: run each step as a separate agent session (default: one continuous session)
  • local: skip pushing to remote after each commit

Development

Install

Run install.sh in the package root. With no environment active it creates and uses a local .venv; with one active (e.g. pyenv) it installs into that environment (editable), without recreating it:

./install.sh --all-extras --groups=test,lint,type

Run ./install.sh --help for all options. Alternatively, run uv sync --all-extras --group test --group lint --group type and uv run pre-commit install to set up the environment manually.

Installing a dependency as editable (e.g. a sibling package) is left to the caller: uv pip install --editable <path>.

With an editable install, fractal install --link symlinks the bundled skill into the agent skill directories instead of copying it, so skill edits apply without re-running the install.

Once installed, run tools with uv run --no-sync <command>, or activate the environment first (source .venv/bin/activate).

Tests

Run the test suite:

pytest .

The suite runs with --doctest-modules enabled, and the integration tests create real git repositories and worktrees.

Linting

Run linters and formatters:

pre-commit run --all-files

Contributing

The contribution workflow, repository conventions, and release process (version sources, tagging, CI guard) are documented in:

  • Contribution workflow (organization-wide): CONTRIBUTING.md
  • Repository conventions: AGENTS.md
  • Release process (organization-wide): RELEASING.md

License

Licensed under the Apache License 2.0 — see LICENSE.

Copyright © 2026 Plasma AI

blocks.html_en: Hierarchical agent loops with recursive self-organization.

sentences.en: Hierarchical agent loops with recursive self-organization.
sentences.zh: 具有递归自组织的分层代理循环。

blocks.html_en: In a fractal, autonomous agent loops arrange themselves into a tree: a node iterates toward a goal in its own git worktree and spawns child nodes for separable subtasks, so the tree grows to fit the problem rather than a fixed plan. Hard caps (iterations, depth, children, cost, time) keep each loop bounded, and an operator can steer or stop it at any point. sentences.en: In a fractal, autonomous agent loops arrange themselves into a tree: a node iterates toward a goal in its own git worktree and spawns child nodes for separable subtasks, so the tree grows to fit the problem rather than a fixed plan.
sentences.zh: 在分形中，自主代理循环将自己排列成一棵树：一个节点在自己的 git 工作树中朝着目标迭代，并为可分离的子任务生成子节点，因此树的增长是为了适应问题而不是固定的计划。

sentences.en: Hard caps (iterations, depth, children, cost, time) keep each loop bounded, and an operator can steer or stop it at any point.
sentences.zh: 硬上限（迭代、深度、子项、成本、时间）保持每个循环的界限，操作员可以在任何点引导或停止它。

sentences.en: Run metadata (including cost) lands in one local SQLite database, which can be interacted with live in a terminal UI.
sentences.zh: 运行元数据（包括成本）存储在一个本地 SQLite 数据库中，该数据库可以在终端 UI 中与实时交互。

blocks.html_en: Usage

A fractal is a tree of git worktrees, each running an autonomous agent loop. The root node branches from your working tree, and child nodes branch from their parent. Agents iterate in tmux sessions, and all state (runs, iters, steps, costs, signals) is tracked in a local SQLite database.

sentences.en: A fractal is a tree of git worktrees, each running an autonomous agent loop.
sentences.zh: 分形是一棵 git 工作树的树，每个工作树都运行一个自治代理循环。

sentences.en: The root node branches from your working tree, and child nodes branch from their parent.
sentences.zh: 根节点从工作树分支，子节点从其父节点分支。

sentences.en: Agents iterate in tmux sessions, and all state (runs, iters, steps, costs, signals) is tracked in a local SQLite database.
sentences.zh: 代理在 tmux 会话中迭代，所有状态（运行、迭代、步骤、成本、信号）都在本地 SQLite 数据库中跟踪。

blocks.html_en: Five agent backends are supported — Claude Code (claude), Codex (codex), Grok Build (grok), OpenCode (opencode), and Oh My Pi (omp) — selected per node with --agent (children inherit it). Claude and Codex can additionally route through OpenRouter with --provider=openrouter, which authenticates via OPENROUTER_API_KEY from the launching shell; OpenCode and Oh My Pi reach OpenRouter natively through their own openrouter/<author>/<model> model ids.

sentences.en: Five agent backends are supported — Claude Code (claude), Codex (codex), Grok Build (grok), OpenCode (opencode), and Oh My Pi (omp) — selected per node with --agent (children inherit it).
sentences.zh: 支持五个代理后端 - Claude Code (claude)、Codex (codex)、Grok Build (grok)、OpenCode (opencode) 和 Oh My Pi (omp) - 使用 --agent 选择每个节点（子级继承它）。

sentences.en: Claude and Codex can additionally route through OpenRouter with --provider=openrouter, which authenticates via OPENROUTER_API_KEY from the launching shell; OpenCode and Oh My Pi reach OpenRouter natively through their own openrouter/<author>/<model> model ids.
sentences.zh: Claude 和 Codex 还可以使用 --provider=openrouter 通过 OpenRouter 进行路由，这会通过启动 shell 中的 OPENROUTER_API_KEY 进行身份验证； OpenCode 和 Oh My Pi 通过它们自己的 openrouter/<author>/<model> 模型 ID 本地访问 OpenRouter。

blocks.html_en: Use the /fractal skill to spawn and manage agent nodes. The fractal CLI is also available directly — run fractal --help and fractal <command> --help to explore.

sentences.en: Use the /fractal skill to spawn and manage agent nodes.
sentences.zh: 使用 /fractal 技能生成和管理代理节点。

sentences.en: The fractal CLI is also available directly — run fractal --help and fractal <command> --help to explore.
sentences.zh: fractal CLI 也可以直接使用 - 运行 fractal --help 和 fractal <command> --help 来探索。

blocks.html_en: The skill is invoked as /fractal [directive] and takes plain-language instructions. The agent interprets the directive and prints any suggested NODE.md instructions and completion requirement it can distill from the directive, plus a table of every parameter (empty where the directive said nothing), then asks for anything it could not infer. From there it walks you through refining the node's definition and, once you approve, launches the node in a tmux session.

sentences.en: The skill is invoked as /fractal [directive] and takes plain-language instructions.
sentences.zh: 该技能以 /fractal [指令] 的形式调用，并采用简单语言指令。

sentences.en: The agent interprets the directive and prints any suggested NODE.md instructions and completion requirement it can distill from the directive, plus a table of every parameter (empty where the directive said nothing), then asks for anything it could not infer.
sentences.zh: 代理解释指令并打印任何建议的 NODE.md 指令和它可以从指令中提取的完成要求，加上每个参数的表（指令什么也没说的地方为空），然后询问任何它无法推断的内容。

sentences.en: From there it walks you through refining the node's definition and, once you approve, launches the node in a tmux session.
sentences.zh: 从这里开始，它会引导您完善节点的定义，一旦您批准，就会在 tmux 会话中启动该节点。

blocks.html_en: • name: node name (required; letters, digits, and _ only — no -)

blocks.html_en: • title: human-readable display name (default: de-slugged node name)

sentences.en: title: human-readable display name (default: de-slugged node name)
sentences.zh: 标题：人类可读的显示名称（默认值：de-slugged 节点名称）

blocks.html_en: • scope: restrict commits to subdirectories within the worktree (comma-separated, e.g. parent/child,tests)

sentences.en: scope: restrict commits to subdirectories within the worktree (comma-separated, e.g. parent/child,tests)
sentences.zh: 范围：限制提交到工作树内的子目录（以逗号分隔，例如父/子、测试）

blocks.html_en: • base: branch to start from (default: current branch)

sentences.en: base: branch to start from (default: current branch)

blocks.html_en: • meta: target node branch for meta-configuration

sentences.en: meta: target node branch for meta-configuration
sentences.zh: meta：元配置的目标节点分支

sentences.en: inherit: seed surfaces from the parent node instead of the package seed (comma-separated: steps, scripts, skills, config, or all); agent config always inherits.
sentences.zh: 继承：来自父节点的种子表面，而不是包种子（逗号分隔：步骤、脚本、技能、配置或全部）；代理配置始终继承。

sentences.en: A top-level spawn's parent is the user node, which carries no steps, scripts, or skills — the parameter is for configured nodes spawning children
sentences.zh: 顶级生成的父节点是用户节点，它不携带任何步骤、脚本或技能 - 该参数用于配置节点生成子节点

blocks.html_en: • agent: agent command; inherits the user node's default when omitted

sentences.en: agent: agent command; inherits the user node's default when omitted
sentences.zh: 代理：代理命令；省略时继承用户节点的默认值

blocks.html_en: • provider: provider route for the agent (e.g. openrouter); inherits the user node's default when omitted

sentences.en: provider: provider route for the agent (e.g. openrouter); inherits the user node's default when omitted

blocks.html_en: • model: model override; when omitted, the agent uses its own default model

sentences.en: model: model override; when omitted, the agent uses its own default model
sentences.zh: model：模型覆盖；省略时，代理使用自己的默认模型

blocks.html_en: • effort: reasoning-effort override; when omitted, each agent seed's own pinned level applies, not the vendor default

sentences.en: effort: reasoning-effort override; when omitted, each agent seed's own pinned level applies, not the vendor default
sentences.zh: 努力：推理-努力优先；省略时，应用每个代理种子自己的固定级别，而不是供应商默认值

blocks.html_en: • max-iters: per-run iteration cap

sentences.en: max-iters: per-run iteration cap
sentences.zh: max-iters：每次运行的迭代上限

blocks.html_en: • max-depth: maximum child node nesting depth

sentences.en: max-depth: maximum child node nesting depth
sentences.zh: max-depth：最大子节点嵌套深度

blocks.html_en: • max-children: maximum direct child nodes

sentences.en: max-children: maximum direct child nodes
sentences.zh: max-children：最大直接子节点

blocks.html_en: • max-descendants: maximum total descendant nodes

sentences.en: max-descendants: maximum total descendant nodes
sentences.zh: max-descendants：最大总后代节点

blocks.html_en: • timeout: per-run time limit (e.g. 30m, 1.5h)

sentences.en: timeout: per-run time limit (e.g. 30m, 1.5h)
sentences.zh: timeout：每次运行的时间限制（例如30m，1.5h）

blocks.html_en: • iter-timeout: per-iteration time limit (e.g. 30m, 1.5h)

sentences.en: iter-timeout: per-iteration time limit (e.g. 30m, 1.5h)
sentences.zh: iter-timeout：每次迭代的时间限制（例如30m，1.5h）

blocks.html_en: • step-timeout: per-step time limit (e.g. 30s, 10m); caps each step

sentences.en: step-timeout: per-step time limit (e.g. 30s, 10m); caps each step
sentences.zh: step-timeout：每步时间限制（例如30s、10m）；每个步骤的上限

blocks.html_en: • interval: fixed iteration schedule (e.g. 1h)

sentences.en: interval: fixed iteration schedule (e.g. 1h)
sentences.zh: 间隔：固定迭代计划（例如1小时）

blocks.html_en: • sleep: delay between iterations (e.g. 10s)

sentences.en: sleep: delay between iterations (e.g. 10s)
sentences.zh: sleep：迭代之间的延迟（例如10秒）

blocks.html_en: • wait: sleep between approval-wait sync invocations (default: 1m)

sentences.en: wait: sleep between approval-wait sync invocations (default: 1m)
sentences.zh: wait：在批准等待同步调用之间休眠（默认值：1m）

blocks.html_en: • max-cost: cost ceiling in USD per run — runs are isolated, so each launch arms the cap anew; after a budget-ended run, node start --continue refuses without an explicit --max-cost

sentences.en: max-cost: cost ceiling in USD per run — runs are isolated, so each launch arms the cap anew; after a budget-ended run, node start --continue refuses without an explicit --max-cost
sentences.zh: max-cost：每次运行的成本上限（以美元为单位）——运行是隔离的，因此每次启动都会重新设置上限；在预算结束的运行之后，节点 start --continue 在没有明确的 --max-cost 的情况下拒绝

blocks.html_en: • max-iter-cost: per-iteration cost ceiling in USD

sentences.en: max-iter-cost: per-iteration cost ceiling in USD
sentences.zh: max-iter-cost：每次迭代成本上限（美元）

blocks.html_en: • max-step-cost: per-step cost ceiling in USD (warn-only when unenforceable)

sentences.en: max-step-cost: per-step cost ceiling in USD (warn-only when unenforceable)
sentences.zh: max-step-cost：每步成本上限（以美元为单位）（仅在不可执行时发出警告）

blocks.html_en: • reserve-budget: budget reserved for cleanup; USD or N% of max-cost (default: 10%)

sentences.en: reserve-budget: budget reserved for cleanup; USD or N% of max-cost (default: 10%)
sentences.zh: Reserve-budget：为清理预留的预算； USD 或最大成本的 N%（默认值：10%）

blocks.html_en: • sync: enable (default) or disable radio sync before each step

sentences.en: sync: enable (default) or disable radio sync before each step
sentences.zh: 同步：在每个步骤之前启用（默认）或禁用无线电同步

blocks.html_en: • detached: run each step as a separate agent session (default: one continuous session)

sentences.en: detached: run each step as a separate agent session (default: one continuous session)
sentences.zh: 分离：将每个步骤作为单独的代理会话运行（默认值：一个连续会话）

blocks.html_en: • local: skip pushing to remote after each commit

sentences.en: local: skip pushing to remote after each commit
sentences.zh: 本地：每次提交后跳过推送到远程

blocks.html_en: Development

sentences.en: Development
sentences.zh: 发展

blocks.html_en: Install

sentences.en: Install
sentences.zh: 安装

blocks.html_en: Run install.sh in the package root. With no environment active it creates and uses a local .venv; with one active (e.g. pyenv) it installs into that environment (editable), without recreating it:

sentences.en: Run install.sh in the package root.
sentences.zh: 在包根目录中运行 install.sh。

sentences.en: With no environment active it creates and uses a local .venv; with one active (e.g. pyenv) it installs into that environment (editable), without recreating it:
sentences.zh: 在没有活动环境的情况下，它会创建并使用本地 .venv；如果有一个活动的（例如 pyenv），它会安装到该环境（可编辑）中，而无需重新创建它：

blocks.html_en: Run ./install.sh --help for all options. Alternatively, run uv sync --all-extras --group test --group lint --group type and uv run pre-commit install to set up the environment manually.

sentences.en: Run ./install.sh --help for all options.
sentences.zh: 运行 ./install.sh --help 查看所有选项。

sentences.en: Alternatively, run uv sync --all-extras --group test --group lint --group type and uv run pre-commit install to set up the environment manually.
sentences.zh: 或者，运行 uvsync --all-extras --group test --group lint --group type 和 uv run pre-commit install 来手动设置环境。

blocks.html_en: Installing a dependency as editable (e.g. a sibling package) is left to the caller: uv pip install --editable <path>.

sentences.en: Installing a dependency as editable (e.g. a sibling package) is left to the caller: uv pip install --editable <path>.
sentences.zh: 将依赖项安装为可编辑（例如同级包）留给调用者： uv pip install --editable <path>。

blocks.html_en: With an editable install, fractal install --link symlinks the bundled skill into the agent skill directories instead of copying it, so skill edits apply without re-running the install.

sentences.en: With an editable install, fractal install --link symlinks the bundled skill into the agent skill directories instead of copying it, so skill edits apply without re-running the install.
sentences.zh: 通过可编辑安装， fractal install --link 将捆绑的技能符号链接到代理技能目录中，而不是复制它，因此无需重新运行安装即可应用技能编辑。

blocks.html_en: Once installed, run tools with uv run --no-sync <command>, or activate the environment first (source .venv/bin/activate).

sentences.en: Once installed, run tools with uv run --no-sync <command>, or activate the environment first (source .venv/bin/activate).
sentences.zh: 安装后，使用 uv run --no-sync <command> 运行工具，或首先激活环境（source .venv/bin/activate）。

blocks.html_en: Tests
Run the test suite:

sentences.en: Run the test suite:
sentences.zh: 运行测试套件：

blocks.html_en: The suite runs with --doctest-modules enabled, and the integration tests create real git repositories and worktrees.

sentences.en: The suite runs with --doctest-modules enabled, and the integration tests create real git repositories and worktrees.
sentences.zh: 该套件在启用 --doctest-modules 的情况下运行，集成测试创建真正的 git 存储库和工作树。

sentences.zh: 毛绒检查

sentences.en: Run linters and formatters:
sentences.zh: 运行 linter 和格式化程序：

content_html_zh:
具有递归自组织的分层代理循环。

在分形中，自主代理循环将自己排列成一棵树：一个节点在自己的 git 工作树中朝着目标迭代，并为可分离的子任务生成子节点，因此树的增长是为了适应问题而不是固定的计划。 硬上限（迭代、深度、子项、成本、时间）保持每个循环的界限，操作员可以在任何点引导或停止它。 运行元数据（包括成本）存储在一个本地 SQLite 数据库中，该数据库可以在终端 UI 中与实时交互。

来源：https://github.com/plasma-ai/fractal

包：https://pypi.org/project/plasma-fractal/

文档：https://docs.plasma.ai/fractal

安装

从 PyPI 安装分形包：

pip install plasma-fractal

or

pip install fractal

使用 pipx install 或 uv tool install 在隔离环境中安装软件包。 如果您使用这两种方法之一，您还必须安装plasma-wiki（简单的pip安装会拉取plasma-wiki并将wiki放在您的路径上，但使用pipx安装或uv工具安装时情况并非如此）。

uv 工具 installplasma-fractal --with-executables-fromplasma-wiki 在一个命令中执行相同的操作。

从项目根目录打开仪表板并打开分形（需要初始化分形）。 如果您的终端使用浅色方案，请传递 --light。

Skill

通过插件市场（Claude Code 和 Codex）为您的代理安装技能：

# Claude Code
/plugin marketplace add plasma-ai/plugins
/plugin install fractal@plasma

# Codex
codex plugin marketplace add plasma-ai/plugins
codex plugin add fractal@plasma

另一种安装路径是从 CLI，它将分形和 wiki 技能复制（或符号链接）到 ~/.claude/skills 和 ~/.agents/skills（仅为当前项目添加 --project）：

fractal install [--link]

升级软件包后，重新运行 fractal install 以刷新复制的技能（通过 --link 进行符号链接安装）。

Usage

分形是一棵 git 工作树的树，每个工作树都运行一个自治代理循环。 根节点从工作树分支，子节点从其父节点分支。 代理在 tmux 会话中迭代，所有状态（运行、迭代、步骤、成本、信号）都在本地 SQLite 数据库中跟踪。

支持五个代理后端 - Claude Code (claude)、Codex (codex)、Grok Build (grok)、OpenCode (opencode) 和 Oh My Pi (omp) - 使用 --agent 选择每个节点（子级继承它）。 Claude 和 Codex 还可以使用 --provider=openrouter 通过 OpenRouter 进行路由，这会通过启动 shell 中的 OPENROUTER_API_KEY 进行身份验证； OpenCode 和 Oh My Pi 通过它们自己的 openrouter/<author>/<model> 模型 ID 本地访问 OpenRouter。

使用 /fractal 技能生成和管理代理节点。 fractal CLI 也可以直接使用 - 运行 fractal --help 和 fractal <command> --help 来探索。

该技能以 /fractal [指令] 的形式调用，并采用简单语言指令。 代理解释指令并打印任何建议的 NODE.md 指令和它可以从指令中提取的完成要求，加上每个参数的表（指令什么也没说的地方为空），然后询问任何它无法推断的内容。 从这里开始，它会引导您完善节点的定义，一旦您批准，就会在 tmux 会话中启动该节点。

技能从指令解释的参数：

  • name：节点名称（必需；仅包含字母、数字和 _ — 否 —）
  • 路径：项目根目录、repo 根目录或 monorepo 子项目（默认值：.）
  • 标题：人类可读的显示名称（默认值：de-slugged 节点名称）
  • 范围：限制提交到工作树内的子目录（以逗号分隔，例如父/子、测试）
  • 基础：开始的分支（默认：当前分支）
  • meta：元配置的目标节点分支
  • 继承：来自父节点的种子表面，而不是包种子（逗号分隔：步骤、脚本、技能、配置或全部）；代理配置始终继承。 顶级生成的父节点是用户节点，它不携带任何步骤、脚本或技能 - 该参数用于配置节点生成子节点
  • 代理：代理命令；省略时继承用户节点的默认值
  • 提供者：代理的提供者路由（例如 openrouter）；省略时继承用户节点的默认值
  • model：模型覆盖；省略时，代理使用自己的默认模型
  • 努力：推理-努力优先；省略时，应用每个代理种子自己的固定级别，而不是供应商默认值
  • max-iters：每次运行的迭代上限
  • max-depth：最大子节点嵌套深度
  • max-children：最大直接子节点
  • max-descendants：最大总后代节点
  • timeout：每次运行的时间限制（例如30m，1.5h）
  • iter-timeout：每次迭代的时间限制（例如30m，1.5h）
  • step-timeout：每步时间限制（例如30s、10m）；每个步骤的上限
  • 间隔：固定迭代计划（例如1小时）
  • sleep：迭代之间的延迟（例如10秒）
  • wait：在批准等待同步调用之间休眠（默认值：1m）
  • max-cost：每次运行的成本上限（以美元为单位）——运行是隔离的，因此每次启动都会重新设置上限；在预算结束的运行之后，节点 start --continue 在没有明确的 --max-cost 的情况下拒绝
  • max-iter-cost：每次迭代成本上限（美元）
  • max-step-cost：每步成本上限（以美元为单位）（仅在不可执行时发出警告）
  • Reserve-budget：为清理预留的预算； USD 或最大成本的 N%（默认值：10%）
  • 同步：在每个步骤之前启用（默认）或禁用无线电同步
  • 分离：将每个步骤作为单独的代理会话运行（默认值：一个连续会话）
  • 本地：每次提交后跳过推送到远程

发展

安装

在包根目录中运行 install.sh。 在没有活动环境的情况下，它会创建并使用本地 .venv；如果有一个活动的（例如 pyenv），它会安装到该环境（可编辑）中，而无需重新创建它：

./install.sh --all-extras --groups=test,lint,type

运行 ./install.sh --help 查看所有选项。 或者，运行 uvsync --all-extras --group test --group lint --group type 和 uv run pre-commit install 来手动设置环境。

将依赖项安装为可编辑（例如同级包）留给调用者： uv pip install --editable <path>。

通过可编辑安装， fractal install --link 将捆绑的技能符号链接到代理技能目录中，而不是复制它，因此无需重新运行安装即可应用技能编辑。

安装后，使用 uv run --no-sync <command> 运行工具，或首先激活环境（source .venv/bin/activate）。

Tests

运行测试套件：

pytest .

该套件在启用 --doctest-modules 的情况下运行，集成测试创建真正的 git 存储库和工作树。

毛绒检查

运行 linter 和格式化程序：

pre-commit run --all-files

贡献

贡献工作流程、存储库约定和发布流程（版本源、标记、CI 防护）记录在：

  • 贡献工作流程（组织范围）：CONTRIBUTING.md
  • 存储库约定：AGENTS.md
  • 发布流程（组织范围）：RELEASING.md

执照
